use_cases: Form validation and agreement confirmations in signup or settings pages
Task management applications requiring toggleable checklist items
E-commerce checkout flows for multiple product selections or filters
Settings panels in SaaS dashboards for feature enablement
Survey and poll builders where users select multiple options
ai_summary: An animated checkbox component built on Radix UI with spring-based scale animations on hover and tap interactions. Features subtle hover shadows and border transitions for visual feedback, supporting all standard checkbox states including disabled and focus-visible rings. Lightweight atomic component suitable for forms, settings panels, and any UI requiring boolean toggle functionality.
